name: historical_notes
Battle of Gergovia: Compressed Gergovia assault: Caesar's legions attack below Vercingetorix's plateau stronghold where steep approaches and confused overextension turn the Roman climb into a defeat.

name: ROMAN
column4: secure the forward hill and keep the assault coordinated on the ascent
column5: take the plateau edge before Vercingetorix can mass defenders

name: GALLIC
column4: use the escarpment camps and plateau lip to splinter the Roman climb
column5: hold Gergovia and turn the overextended assault into a rout
